items.title: Apne Paraye Out on OTT: Know Where to Watch This Hindi Dub of Bengali Drama Series
items.summary: Apne Paraye is an intense family drama show that is a Hindi dub of the Bengali show - Shakha Proshaka. It is now available to stream on Amazon MX Player and Prime Video.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Once close enough for an acquisition, Stripe and Airwallex are now going after each other
items.summary: For most of its life, Airwallex and Stripe have mostly operated in different geographies, selling to different buyers. That's changing.
